exploration_notes:
## Access Log Filter Implementations (source/common/access_log/)

All filter implementations are in `access_log_impl.h/.cc`. Filters are boolean evaluators (not loggers), so they do NOT produce text/JSON output. They are:
- **ComparisonFilter** (base), **StatusCodeFilter**, **DurationFilter** — compare numeric values
- **OperatorFilter** (base), **AndFilter**, **OrFilter** — boolean combinators
- **NotHealthCheckFilter**, **TraceableRequestFilter**, **RuntimeFilter** — conditional filters
